channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bed frame and other bits, 9th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped bedfram and other bed goods outs 31 Southampton way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St Marks school recycling bin, 9th June
item.description:
Paper has blown from the bin down the street as overflowing and lid not closed. 8 plus sheets in my front garden. 2 days now and not the first time

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aylesbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, damage to pavement, 9th June
item.description:
This tree is far too large and only been pruned once in 8 years, some upper limbs lack stability and the roots have made the pavement uneven and damaged the road surface creating cracks/potholes that are due to be repaired. Dropped leaves, twigs, small branches are continually found on driveways, road and pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches have fallen off large tree, 9th June
item.description:
2 very large branches have come off a large tree outside 37 Waghorn Street, this happened after 12.45 and 4pm on 9.6.26. The branches are now blocking a car space but are not currently blocking the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Waghorn Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole road blocked by tree, 9th June
item.description:
As above. Your emergency phoneline is very slow!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crockenhill Road, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive antisemitic grafitti on substation door, 9th June
item.description:
Written graffiti is obscene and very visible from the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riley Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning has stopped AGAIN, 9th June
item.description:
For years and years I have been complaining about how Veolia keeps stopping cleaning the street - each time we complain it starts up again regularly and then stops - it has now stopped and we see street cleaners cleaning adjacent roads and they leave Bedford Road - we now have alot of rubbish for parked cars littering and leaves - please clean!!! This is a basic request!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Bedford Road, Crouch End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fantastic job, 9th June
item.description:
What a great clear up job was done all the way up footpath from Tesco well done to the contractor!!!!!!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dentons Wharf, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pots holes, 9th June
item.description:
This has been reported many times and now it is worse than previously - we have stones and rocks all over the road and it’s dangerous as cars drive over them. PLEASE FIX FOR ONCE AND FOR ALL

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Bedford Road, Crouch End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement obstruction 20 black bahs, 9th June
item.description:
Dangerous. My disabled husband has to step into main road to pasd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Welling High Street, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low Hanging Branches, 9th June
item.description:
Low branches at Cray Avenue/Court Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various litter, 9th June
item.description:
Lots of litter on pavement outside 97 St James’s ave on the St James’s ave side and also on Cromwell road been there a long time includes cans plastic and a shoe thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hampden Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian refuge lamppost bent and light not working, 9th June
item.description:
Pedestrian refuge island at 220 Hurst Road. Lamppost leaning over/bent and light module hanging from housing and not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 216, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipping here, 9th June
item.description:
Please can you put a fixed camera here to catch the repeat tippers

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: About 20 black bags obstructing the footpath, 9th June
item.description:
My disabled husband couldn't get past without stepping into main road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 146-148, Park View Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped blanket, 9th June
item.description:
Fly tipped blanket

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trewsbury Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: So much litter, 9th June
item.description:
Footways along Bugsbys Way are full of litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large overgrown hedge obstructing pavement, 9th June
item.description:
This has been reported previously and no action has been taken. This is an example of a neglected hedge that has far exceeded the boundary and needs to be trimmed to make the whole pavement available for walking. The hedge is in Lynwood Grove but belongs to 218 Crofton Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynwood Grove, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 9th June
item.description:
Whilst walking down the road on Glyndon road I found a blocked drain covered in weeds and debris as picture shows completely blocked. Potentially this has been over a month since been there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign, 9th June
item.description:
Parking times sign has fallen off the lamppost near the car park locate near grass area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-44, Claude Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
